photoEditor.wordWidthHint: How much of the poster width the word covers. Higher values = bigger letters.
photoEditor.maskFontHint: The font is part of the design and cannot be changed in the editor.
photoEditor.defaultSlotColorHint: Used while a letter has no photo yet. Can be overridden per slot.
photoEditor.nextStepHint: Next, upload a photo for each letter — or leave the slot in its color.
photoEditor.slotsHint: One photo slot per letter. Tap or click a letter on the poster to select it.
photoEditor.slotCropHint: Drag the slot on the poster to pan the image.

hero.subtitle: Create a personal map poster from any spot on Earth in just a few minutes — no design skills required.

features.heading: Everything you need
features.subtitle: From picking the map to the finished print — in just a few minutes.
features.f1Description: Search any location, zoom and pan until the framing feels right.
features.f2Description: Add a title, names or coordinates and pick from a range of fonts.
features.f3Description: A4 and A3 — every size is exported at full print resolution (300 dpi).
features.f4Description: Download your poster as a PNG or PDF, or order it printed and framed straight away.

examples.subtitle: Here's how your poster could look.

consent.title: Cookies & Tracking
consent.intro: We use cookies to improve our site and measure advertising. Necessary cookies are always active. Analytics and marketing cookies only with your consent. Details in our <link>cookie policy</link>.
consent.necessaryDescription: For cart, sign-in and checkout — always active.
consent.analyticsDescription: Helps us understand how the site is used (e.g. Google Analytics).
consent.marketingDescription: Measurement and remarketing for Google Ads, Meta, TikTok.
